column2: Ticket Check-in (Manual Code Entry) - Branch Staff
Verify Branch Staff can validate and check in tickets by manually entering the booking code, and that already-used or invalid tickets are rejected.
Verify a valid ticket by entering its booking code
column3:
1. Login as Branch Staff.
2. Open the "Ticket Check-in" screen.
3. Type a valid ticket code (e.g. BK-A1B2C3) into the code box.
4. Click "Verify".
column4: Ticket details are displayed (movie, room, seat(s), showtime) and the ticket is marked valid, ready to be checked in.
column5: Booking is CONFIRMED, not yet checked in, and belongs to the staff's branch.

column2: Check in a valid ticket after verifying
column3: 1. After a valid ticket is verified (TICKET-001), click "Check-in".
column4: The seat's is_checked_in becomes true with check_in_time recorded; message "Valid - Checked in" is shown; booking status becomes USED once all its seats are checked in.
column5: A valid ticket has just been verified (TICKET-001).

column2: Enter a ticket code that was already checked in
column3:
1. Type a ticket code that was already checked in earlier.
2. Click "Verify" / "Check-in".
column4: System returns "ALREADY_USED"; entry is denied; no change to is_checked_in / check_in_time.
column5: The ticket was already checked in (booking USED / is_checked_in = true).
column15: Verified live: POST /staff/ticket-validate action=checkin on an already-USED booking (BK-000003) -> status=ALREADY_USED, allowEntry=false, checkInTime unchanged.

column2: Enter a ticket code of a CANCELLED or PENDING booking
column3:
1. Type a ticket code whose booking is not CONFIRMED.
2. Click "Verify".
column4: System rejects the check-in with an appropriate error (e.g. "Booking not confirmed"); no check-in is recorded.
column5: Booking status is CANCELLED or PENDING.
